Struct NVAPITimingExtDto

NVAPIWrapper

NVAPIWrapper.dll

Managed representation of the NV_TIMINGEXT extended timing information.

uint

Name

Timing name (null-terminated ASCII, up to 40 bytes). Empty string when no name is present.

string

ushort

ushort

uint
